name: Chuck's Clam Chowder
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds Potatoes, diced, skin left on
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute celery and onions in 2 tablespoons of butter for 10 minutes until opaque.
2. Add to the chicken stock.
3. Add the juice only from the clams, reserving the meat. Bring to a heavy simmer and add pepper and thyme.
4. Add the potatoes with skin on and simmer until cooked but still firm.
5. While the potatoes are cooking in the soup, warm the milk.
6. Make a roux with the butter and flour. When cooked, add to the milk off heat.
7. Stir and return to the heat and stir until thickened. Set aside.
8. When the potatoes are just tender, add the clam meat, cook for 2 minutes then add the milk sauce.
9. Simmer for 8 minutes, then add the sherry. Simmer for 2 more minutes.
10. Garnish with parsley and serve.
